title: Sanskrit-Tibetan Workspace Dictionary Entry
description: JSONL line schema. Each entry = one dictionary headword.

id.description: Stable globally unique ID. Format: {dict_slug}-{seq}. e.g., 'mw-00001'.

headword.description: Original headword as-is from source (HK, Devanagari, or IAST). Archival only — UI MUST NOT display this directly for Sanskrit entries; use headword_iast.

headword_iast.description: IAST-normalized headword for display. REQUIRED. For lang=skt/pi, always IAST (e.g., 'dharma', 'śānti', 'ajña'). For lang=bo, Wylie form (IAST is Sanskrit-specific). For lang=zh, original Chinese. Generated at build time via transliterate.detect_and_convert_to_iast().

headword_norm.description: Normalized search key. IAST → NFD → strip combining marks → lowercase → trim. Used for exact O(1) lookup. MUST match Python transliterate.normalize_headword() output exactly.

lang.description: Headword language. skt=Sanskrit, bo=Tibetan, zh=Chinese, pi=Pali, ru=Russian.

tier.description: Display tier for UI expand state. 1=auto-expand, 2=expand on match, 3=collapsed.

priority.description: Global sort order across dicts. Lower = higher in results. 1=Apte, 2=MW, 3=Macdonell, etc. Redundant with dict's meta.json priority; included here for fast sorting at query time.

plain.description: Plain text body. Full definition content. Used in Zone C.

snippet_short.description: First complete sense/definition (~120 chars target, 180 max). Snippet boundaries aligned to sentence/semicolon/numbered-sense. Displayed in Zone A instant. Generated by build_tier0.py via smart-snippet extractor.

snippet_medium.description: First 2-3 senses (~400 chars target). Displayed when user clicks 'more' on Zone A.

ko.description: Korean translation. Required for entries where target_lang is DE/FR/LA/RU/ZH. Generated by translation pipeline (Claude Sonnet 4.5 batch). Empty string = translation pending.

senses.description: Parsed senses when source structure is detectable (Apte, MW numbered senses). Optional — empty array if not parseable.

source_meta.description: Source-specific metadata (page number, edition, entry_num, etc.). Free-form.

cross_refs.description: Other entry IDs this entry references (cf., see, →, etc.). Used for frequency ranking in top-10K selection.

flags.description: QA flags for issues caught during build/verify. Shown as badges in UI or used for filtering.

body.plain: Religion; the customary observances of a caste, sect, &c.; law, usage, practice, custom, ordinance, statue. -2 Religious or moral merit, virtue, righteousness, good works ...
body.snippet_short: Religion; the customary observances of a caste, sect, &c.; law, usage, practice, custom, ordinance, statue.
body.snippet_medium: Religion; the customary observances of a caste, sect, &c.; law, usage, practice, custom, ordinance, statue. -2 Religious or moral merit, virtue, righteousness, good works. -3 Duty, prescribed course of conduct...

body.plain: m. (rarely n. g. ardharcâdi; the older form of the cf. RV. is dhárman q.v.) that which is established or firm, steadfast decree, statute, ordinance, law; usage, practice...
body.snippet_short: m. that which is established or firm, steadfast decree, statute, ordinance, law.
body.snippet_medium: m. that which is established or firm, steadfast decree, statute, ordinance, law; usage, practice, customary observance or prescribed conduct, duty...
